series_metadata.series_title: School File for Sponsored Community Schools
series_metadata.series_description: Contract, application correspondence, compliance documents and any other documents related to the sponsorship of a community school by the Office of School Sponsorship.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain two years from the date of the expiration of Office of School Sponsorship, which may include non-renewal, termination, transfer or closure. ; Electronic: Retain two years from the date of the expiration of Office of School Sponsorship, which may include non-renewal, termination, transfer or closure, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
